Name: HEADSET H820E MONO WRL/981-000512 LOGITECH
Short description:
During long conference calls, getting up out of your chair can make all the difference. Wearing the Logitech H820e Wireless Headset frees you to take notes on a whiteboard, step into a quiet office, or stand up and stretch. Designed for comfort as well as convenience, H820e includes a padded headband and soft, replaceable ear pads, with noise-cancelling technology. The Logitech H820e Headset stays connected within 100 meters of your desk, with up to 10 hours of wideband talk time. The headset’s DECT wireless connectivity won’t interfere with Wi-Fi devices in your office. Enjoy comfort and style. The lightweight, contemporary design of the H820e Headset is complemented by top-quality materials like TR90 nylon, a padded leatherette headband, and replaceable leatherette ear pads to provide many hours of comfort and durability.

Name: HEADSET WRL Q20I/BLACK A3004G11 SOUNDCORE
Short description:
Q20i Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling Headphones.
Hybrid Active Noise Cancelling: 2 internal and 2 external mics work in tandem to detect external noise and effectively reduce up to 90% of it, such as planes and car engines.
Immerse Yourself in Detailed Audio: The noise cancelling headphones have oversized 40mm dynamic drivers that produce detailed sound and thumping beats with BassUp technology. Compatible with Hi-Res certified audio via the AUX cable for more detail.

Short description:
Canon PIXMA TS3550i Wireless Colour 3-in-One Inkjet Photo Printer, Black

The PIXMA TS3550i is a compact and easy-to-use printer, scanner and copier. It’s simple to set up, with wireless connection at the touch of a button. Control it remotely with the latest technology: you can copy, scan or print from smartphone and tablet using the Canon PRINT app, or print app-free with AirPrint (iOS) and Mopria (Android). Access Point Mode allows you to connect your device directly to the printer without the need for an internet connection or router. Keep your documents crisp and images bright with FINE cartridges, and get creative with the Easy-PhotoPrint Editor app and Canon Creative Park. This 3-in-one inkjet printer is an ideal first printer, with essential features at an affordable price and is compatible with the PIXMA Print Plan, a monthly subscription for inks based on pages printed.

Short description:
Canon i-SENSYS MF752Cdw

Optimal print and scan productivity from a colour multi-function printer with direct cloud connectivity.
An updated colour engine in the Canon i-SENSYS MF750 Series delivers advanced usability and connectivity capabilities, as well as fast print and scan speeds, to boost your business productivity.
Work faster by printing and scanning at speeds of up to 33ppm and 100ipm* (A4), as well as utilising a wide range of media handling with the ability to scan small documents such as cheques and receipts.
Centralise print management with cloud-based Universal Print by Microsoft and access documents directly from cloud storage services: Google Drive, DropBox and OneDrive.
Streamline workflows with drag and drop tabs to customise the display and create one-touch shortcut buttons with Application Library apps.
Advanced system verification protects the device from hacking and virus threats as soon as you start up, while Secure PIN restricts access to sensitive documents.

Name: HEADSET/MAESTRO 300 MSI
Short description:
Gaming Gear
MAESTRO 300

The lightweight MAESTRO 300 gaming headset delivers immersive audio with high-resolution 40mm neodymium drivers and clear voice capture via an unidirectional microphone, featuring universal plug-and-play compatibility. Its swiveling, tiltable ear cups, adjustable headband, and high-density memory foam earpads—available in breathable mesh or protein leather—ensure a comfortable fit for any head. The Nahimic for headset software offers unparalleled immersion with advanced 3D sound and audio tuning. - High-resolution 40mm Neodymium Drivers - Fine-tuned by MSI to reproduce true-to-life audio for immersive playback.
- Detachable Unidirectional (Cardioid) Mic - A high-quality microphone for clear voice capture.
- Mesh Chill or Leather Thrill - High-density foam earpads with breathable mesh for freshness or luxurious protein leather for isolation.
- Durable Lightweight Comfort - Weighs just 247g (without mic) with swiveling earcups and adjustable headband to fit any head shape.
- Plug & Play across Platforms - Compatible with PC, Mac, PS5/4, Switch, and Mobile using USB-C cable or USB-C to A adapter.
- Nahimic for Headset - Renowned audio software offering 3D sound and advanced tuning for immersive gaming.

Name: HEADSET EARPHONES GXT409 OXXIE/GAMING 25478 TRUST
Short description:
Lag-free legend
Hear all the action as soon as it happens with the Oxxie True Wireless Gaming Earphones. With a reliable gaming grade low-latency 2.4Ghz wireless connection via its USB-C receiver, you’ll get awesome gaming, lag-free.

True Blue(tooth)
Want to pick up calls or listen to music while you play? No problem! These earphones’ dual wireless functionality allows you to easily switch over to Bluetooth to connect with your mobile phone.

More fun, less interruptions
Get ready to play on thanks to the Oxxie's hefty battery life. With up to 7 hours of non-stop playtime on a single charge, and up to 42 hours with the charging case, keep on enjoying your games, music, movies and more for as long as you like.

Say no to noise
These earphones’ microphones put the focus right where it’s meant to be – on your voice. With four ENC noise-cancelling microphones, the Zunta effectively removes background noise for crystal-clear communication.

Platform pal
The Oxxie is meant to be enjoyed, no matter what platform you use! Compatible with PC, PlayStation, Switch, mobile and other Bluetooth devices; take advantage of great sound, however you like to play.

All the extras
With handy LED indicators right on the earphones themselves, you’ll know exactly when you need to charge up. Simply pop them into the included charging case and you’ll be back and ready to go in no time at all.
